title: Solutions
intro: A log of hearing real voices, iterating ideas, and solving problems.

cards.title: Restraint Glove for Disabled Elderly People
cards.image_alt: Restraint glove for disabled elderly people
cards.summary: Within necessary restraint, provide comfort, reassurance, and autonomy.
cards.quote: How much pain must a person seek relief from through another kind of pain?

cards.title: ElectroMap: Stories of the World
cards.summary: An interactive map created for the UWC Day workshop “Share Peace Story,” inviting people to begin with curiosity toward faraway places and their stories.
cards.quote: “Every story happening in the world has something to do with you and me.” — Liangzi
